constraints.name: app_events_app_user_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (app_user_id) REFERENCES app_users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

constraints.name: app_events_place_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (place_id) REFERENCES places(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

constraints.name: app_events_route_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (route_id) REFERENCES routes(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

constraints.name: app_events_session_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (session_id) REFERENCES app_sessions(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

constraints.name: app_events_shared_link_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (shared_link_id) REFERENCES shared_links(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

constraints.name: app_sessions_app_user_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (app_user_id) REFERENCES app_users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: app_users_auth_user_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (auth_user_id) REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: discovery_run_places_place_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (place_id) REFERENCES places(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT

constraints.name: discovery_run_places_run_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (run_id) REFERENCES discovery_runs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: discovery_run_tags_run_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (run_id) REFERENCES discovery_runs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: discovery_run_tags_tag_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (tag_id) REFERENCES tags(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT

constraints.name: discovery_runs_app_user_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (app_user_id) REFERENCES app_users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: discovery_runs_check
constraints.definition: CHECK (completed_at IS NULL OR completed_at >= started_at)

constraints.name: discovery_runs_neighborhood_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (neighborhood_id) REFERENCES neighborhoods(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

constraints.name: discovery_runs_session_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (session_id) REFERENCES app_sessions(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

constraints.name: neighborhoods_map_pin_x_range
constraints.definition: CHECK (map_pin_x IS NULL OR map_pin_x >= 0::numeric AND map_pin_x <= 100::numeric)

constraints.name: neighborhoods_map_pin_y_range
constraints.definition: CHECK (map_pin_y IS NULL OR map_pin_y >= 0::numeric AND map_pin_y <= 100::numeric)

constraints.name: notify_taste_results_referrer_share_slug_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (referrer_share_slug) REFERENCES notify_taste_results(share_slug) ON DELETE SET NULL

constraints.name: notify_taste_results_score_valid
constraints.definition: CHECK (compatibility_score IS NULL OR compatibility_score >= 0 AND compatibility_score <= 100)

constraints.name: onboarding_answers_app_user_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (app_user_id) REFERENCES app_users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: onboarding_answers_option_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (option_id) REFERENCES onboarding_options(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: onboarding_answers_option_matches_question
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (question_id, option_id) REFERENCES onboarding_options(question_id, id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: onboarding_answers_question_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (question_id) REFERENCES onboarding_questions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: onboarding_options_question_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (question_id) REFERENCES onboarding_questions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: place_actions_app_user_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (app_user_id) REFERENCES app_users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: place_actions_place_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (place_id) REFERENCES places(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: place_actions_state_count_consistency
constraints.definition: CHECK ((state <> 'saved'::text OR saved_count >= 1) AND (state <> 'skipped'::text OR skipped_count >= 1))

constraints.name: place_photos_place_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (place_id) REFERENCES places(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: place_photos_provider_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (provider_id) REFERENCES photo_providers(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

constraints.name: place_tags_place_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (place_id) REFERENCES places(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: place_tags_tag_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (tag_id) REFERENCES tags(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: places_external_pair
constraints.definition: CHECK (external_source IS NULL AND external_place_id IS NULL OR external_source IS NOT NULL AND external_place_id IS NOT NULL)

constraints.name: places_place_type_tag_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (place_type_tag_id) REFERENCES tags(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

constraints.name: route_places_place_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (place_id) REFERENCES places(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT

constraints.name: route_places_route_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (route_id) REFERENCES routes(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: routes_app_user_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (app_user_id) REFERENCES app_users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: screen_review_tasks_screen_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (screen_id) REFERENCES screen_review_screens(screen_id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: shared_links_check
constraints.definition: CHECK (content_type = 'place'::text AND place_id IS NOT NULL AND route_id IS NULL OR content_type = 'route'::text AND route_id IS NOT NULL AND place_id IS NULL)

constraints.name: shared_links_expiry_after_creation
constraints.definition: CHECK (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > created_at)

constraints.name: shared_links_place_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (place_id) REFERENCES places(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: shared_links_route_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (route_id) REFERENCES routes(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

constraints.name: tags_group_id_fkey
constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (group_id) REFERENCES tag_groups(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
